VIDEO 1

Writing Facebook Ads With

5

Mike

Buontempo





Let’s put together Facebook Ad copy for a new promo I’m rolling out. It’s my

$6,000 consulting program, and I’ll go through the process I would for any client / internal promotion.





Customer Avatar: Who am I actually writing this ad to?



My copy is going to be way different if I’m talking to 22 year old women who are just getting out of college, compared to a 50 - 60 conservative male.



In our case, we’re going after people who are offering professional services,

consulting, something high ticket they can sell over the phone.



The Avatar is gonna skew towards Male, 28+, they make $100,000 a year, they want to get ‘bigger’ and better clients.



They either don’t have a sales funnel setup or it’s not working to bring them in high-paying clients.





Product: Trying to get leads for a $6,000 consulting program on how to get more clients. They click the ad, optin, watch presentation, book call, then get sold a $6,000 program over the phone.





Big Idea: How to sign ‘Whales’ as clients that pay 5x as much, for the same amount of work you’re currently doing.





Link to Sales Funnel / Product:

https://clientaccelerators.com/case-study





Ad Copy:

ATTENTION: Business Owners Who Want More High-Paying Clients. Let me ask you a question..

Do you want 15 more clients that pay you $500 - $2,000..



Or do you want 2 or 3 “Whales” that pay you anywhere from $10,000 -

$100,000 a month?



Well obviously it’d be a lot easier to just handle 2-3 Whale Clients, instead of handling a lot of little clients that pay you a lot less.



What if there was a way to ‘HUNT’ down these ‘WHALES’ and land them as clients?



Well there is.



You see, I was able to scale my agency to $200,000 a month in recurring income in 18 months of launching it by focusing on ‘WHALES’.



Clients that can afford to pay anywhere from $10,000 - $100,000 a month.



Clients that would pay for the upside that we bring them as well.



Now these clients are actually easier to land then smaller clients when you know how to actually talk to them.



You see, most ‘WHALES’ are educated on the product / service you already offer, they already can see how it will benefit them, make their lives easier, and ultimately make them an ROI of some sort.



You don’t have to go back and forth selling them on why they need your product or service..



With ‘Minnows’ (as we like to call them) you have to educate them, work harder to sell them, and charge a lot less to get the sale because they just don’t have the funds.





When you speak “Whale” you will bring your perfect client in each time.



So when they fill out an application to work with you, you already know they can afford you, it’s just a matter of showing them you’re the best choice.



I decided to put together a training showing business owners exactly how we were able to land clients that pay us up to $100,000+ per month, where to find them, how to talk to them, and more.



Best part is?



It’s completely free.



Go register here: https://clientaccelerators.com/case-study



I go over how we landed our biggest clients, how we set up our offers to get

paid with upside, so as the client does well, we get paid more. Plus:

How we were able to land $29,000 a month recurring in new business in

our first 61 days in business



What ‘Bait’ to put out to attract ‘Whales’ to your offer, that will have them

ready to work with you as the premier choice



Why you need to charge ‘Premium’ Prices in order to actually capture ‘Whales’ (hint: Minnow pricing actually repels them!)



How one of our consulting clients landed their biggest client ever, 1-800- Junk and picked up over $33,000 in new business in the first 1 and a half weeks of working with us



Plus so much more.



This training is completely free.



However there is an offer at the end of it to work with us if you feel like you

could use our help.





The training is worth it’s weight in gold on it’s own.



You will leave with a ton of new strategies and tactics to actually start landing higher paying whales in your business.



So go to: https://clientaccelerators.com/case-study I’ll see you inside.

Mike Buontempo









https://lp.partnerwithmikeb.com/bookagency
